plugin.name: Party_Bars
plugin.author: Claude
plugin.purpose: Displays HP and SP bars from party prompts
plugin.description:
Party Bars - Displays graphical HP/SP bars from ZombieMUD party prompts
Aliases: partybars - Toggle window visibility partybars status - Show current Party Bars status partybars copy - Copy current HP/SP summary to clipboard partybars reset - Reset window position partybars size [width] [height] - Resize the window partybars name [name] - Set your character name for party parsing partybars lock/unlock - Lock or unlock supported ZombieMUD miniwindows

muclient.script:
require "movewindow"
-- Configuration local ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID = "11e1d11e4a0d932dd870363f" local WIN_ID = "party_bars_" .. GetPluginID() local WIN_WIDTH = 220 local WIN_HEIGHT = 70 local MIN_WIN_WIDTH = 150 local MIN_WIN_HEIGHT = 58 local MAX_WIN_WIDTH = 520 local MAX_WIN_HEIGHT = 180 local BAR_HEIGHT = 18 local BAR_MARGIN = 8 local RESIZE_HANDLE = 14 local STALE_SECONDS = 60 local FONT_ID = "bar_font" local FONT_SIZE = 9
-- Colors local COLOR_BG = ColourNameToRGB("black") local COLOR_BORDER = ColourNameToRGB("gray") local COLOR_HP_FULL = ColourNameToRGB("lime") local COLOR_HP_MED = ColourNameToRGB("yellow") local COLOR_HP_LOW = ColourNameToRGB("red") local COLOR_SP_FULL = ColourNameToRGB("dodgerblue") local COLOR_SP_MED = ColourNameToRGB("cyan") local COLOR_SP_LOW = ColourNameToRGB("magenta") local COLOR_BAR_BG = ColourNameToRGB("#333333") local COLOR_TEXT = ColourNameToRGB("white") local COLOR_TEXT_SHADOW = ColourNameToRGB("black") local COLOR_MUTED = ColourNameToRGB("dimgray") local COLOR_STALE = ColourNameToRGB("khaki") local COLOR_RESIZE = ColourNameToRGB("silver")
-- State local current_hp = 0 local max_hp = 1 local current_sp = 0 local max_sp = 1 local player_name = "" local my_name = "" local window_visible = true local windowinfo = nil local last_update = 0 local resize_state = nil
local function clamp(value, low, high) value = tonumber(value) or low if value < low then return low end if value > high then return high end return value end
local function manager_locked() if IsPluginInstalled(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID) then local ok, result, value = pcall(CallPlugin, ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID, "isLocked", "") if ok then return value == "1" or result == "1" end end return false end
local function call_manager(function_name) if IsPluginInstalled(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID) then local ok, err = pcall(CallPlugin, ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID, function_name, "") if ok then return true end ColourNote("red", "", "Party Bars: Could not call window manager: " .. tostring(err)) return false end ColourNote("yellow", "", "Party Bars: ZombieMUD Miniwindow Manager is not loaded.") return false end
local function prompt_age() if last_update == 0 then return nil end return math.max(0, os.time() - last_update) end
local function is_stale() local age = prompt_age() return age ~= nil and age >= STALE_SECONDS end
local function party_status_text() local hp_pct = max_hp > 0 and math.floor((current_hp / max_hp) * 100) or 0 local sp_pct = max_sp > 0 and math.floor((current_sp / max_sp) * 100) or 0 local who = player_name ~= "" and player_name or my_name if who == "" then who = "unknown" end
local age = prompt_age() local age_text = age and (age .. "s ago") or "not seen yet" return string.format("%s HP: %d/%d (%d%%), SP: %d/%d (%d%%), prompt: %s", who, current_hp, max_hp, hp_pct, current_sp, max_sp, sp_pct, age_text) end
local function move_resize_hotspot() if not WindowInfo(WIN_ID, 1) then return end local id = WIN_ID .. "_resize" if WindowHotspotInfo(WIN_ID, id, 1) then WindowMoveHotspot(WIN_ID, id, WIN_WIDTH - RESIZE_HANDLE, WIN_HEIGHT - RESIZE_HANDLE, WIN_WIDTH, WIN_HEIGHT) else WindowAddHotspot(WIN_ID, id, WIN_WIDTH - RESIZE_HANDLE, WIN_HEIGHT - RESIZE_HANDLE, WIN_WIDTH, WIN_HEIGHT, "", "", "on_resize_down", "", "on_resize_up", "Drag to resize Party Bars", miniwin.cursor_both_arrow, 0) WindowDragHandler(WIN_ID, id, "on_resize_drag", "on_resize_release", 0x10) end end
local function draw_resize_tag() local right = WIN_WIDTH - 3 local bottom = WIN_HEIGHT - 3 WindowLine(WIN_ID, right - 9, bottom, right, bottom - 9, COLOR_RESIZE, miniwin.pen_solid, 1) WindowLine(WIN_ID, right - 5, bottom, right, bottom - 5, COLOR_RESIZE, miniwin.pen_solid, 1) end
local function register_with_window_manager() if IsPluginInstalled(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID) then CallPlugin(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID, "registerMiniwindow", WIN_ID) end end
local function boost_window() if IsPluginInstalled(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID) then CallPlugin(ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID, "boostMe", WIN_ID) end end
local function resize_to(width, height, quiet) WIN_WIDTH = clamp(width, MIN_WIN_WIDTH, MAX_WIN_WIDTH) WIN_HEIGHT = clamp(height, MIN_WIN_HEIGHT, MAX_WIN_HEIGHT) WindowResize(WIN_ID, WIN_WIDTH, WIN_HEIGHT, COLOR_BG) move_resize_hotspot() draw_bars() if not quiet then ColourNote("lime", "", "Party Bars: Resized to " .. WIN_WIDTH .. "x" .. WIN_HEIGHT) end end
local function set_visible(show, quiet) window_visible = show and true or false WindowShow(WIN_ID, window_visible) if window_visible then draw_bars() end if not quiet then ColourNote(window_visible and "lime" or "yellow", "", "Party Bars: Window " .. (window_visible and "shown" or "hidden")) end end
local function set_character_name(new_name) new_name = (new_name or ""):gsub("^%s+", ""):gsub("%s+$", "") if new_name == "" then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Party Bars: Character name was not changed.") return end my_name = new_name player_name = my_name SetVariable("my_name", my_name) ColourNote("lime", "", "Party Bars: Character name set to " .. my_name) draw_bars() end
local function on_window_mousedown(flags, hotspot_id, win) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then return true end if manager_locked() then return true end boost_window() return false end
local function on_window_dragmove(flags, hotspot_id, win) return manager_locked() end
local function on_window_mouseup(flags, hotspot_id, win) if bit.band(flags, miniwin.hotspot_got_rh_mouse) ~= 0 then show_context_menu() end end
function OnPluginInstall() -- Load saved state window_visible = GetVariable("visible") ~= "0" my_name = GetVariable("my_name") or "" player_name = my_name WIN_WIDTH = clamp(GetVariable("win_width") or WIN_WIDTH, MIN_WIN_WIDTH, MAX_WIN_WIDTH) WIN_HEIGHT = clamp(GetVariable("win_height") or WIN_HEIGHT, MIN_WIN_HEIGHT, MAX_WIN_HEIGHT)
-- Use movewindow library to handle positioning windowinfo = movewindow.install(WIN_ID, miniwin.pos_top_left, 0, false, nil, { mousedown = on_window_mousedown, mouseup = on_window_mouseup, dragmove = on_window_dragmove, }, {x = 50, y = 50})
-- Create the window WindowCreate(WIN_ID, windowinfo.window_left, windowinfo.window_top, WIN_WIDTH, WIN_HEIGHT, windowinfo.window_mode, windowinfo.window_flags, COLOR_BG)
-- Install font WindowFont(WIN_ID, FONT_ID, "Consolas", FONT_SIZE, true, false, false, false)
-- Register drag handler once at init (entire window is the drag zone) movewindow.add_drag_handler(WIN_ID, 0, 0, 0, 0) move_resize_hotspot()
if window_visible then WindowShow(WIN_ID, true) draw_bars() end register_with_window_manager() end
function OnPluginSaveState() SetVariable("visible", window_visible and "1" or "0") SetVariable("my_name", my_name) SetVariable("win_width", tostring(WIN_WIDTH)) SetVariable("win_height", tostring(WIN_HEIGHT)) movewindow.save_state(WIN_ID) end
function get_hp_color(percentage) if percentage > 0.6 then return COLOR_HP_FULL elseif percentage > 0.3 then return COLOR_HP_MED else return COLOR_HP_LOW end end
function get_sp_color(percentage) if percentage > 0.6 then return COLOR_SP_FULL elseif percentage > 0.3 then return COLOR_SP_MED else return COLOR_SP_LOW end end
function draw_bars() if not window_visible then return end
-- Clear window WindowRectOp(WIN_ID, miniwin.rect_fill, 0, 0, WIN_WIDTH, WIN_HEIGHT, COLOR_BG)
-- Draw border WindowRectOp(WIN_ID, miniwin.rect_frame, 0, 0, WIN_WIDTH, WIN_HEIGHT, COLOR_BORDER)
local bar_width = WIN_WIDTH - (BAR_MARGIN * 2) local hp_y = BAR_MARGIN local sp_y = BAR_MARGIN + BAR_HEIGHT + 6
-- Calculate percentages local hp_pct = max_hp > 0 and (current_hp / max_hp) or 0 local sp_pct = max_sp > 0 and (current_sp / max_sp) or 0
-- Clamp to 0-1 hp_pct = math.max(0, math.min(1, hp_pct)) sp_pct = math.max(0, math.min(1, sp_pct)) local stale = is_stale()
-- HP Bar background WindowRectOp(WIN_ID, miniwin.rect_fill, BAR_MARGIN, hp_y, BAR_MARGIN + bar_width, hp_y + BAR_HEIGHT, COLOR_BAR_BG)
-- HP Bar fill local hp_fill_width = math.floor(bar_width * hp_pct) if hp_fill_width > 0 then WindowRectOp(WIN_ID, miniwin.rect_fill, BAR_MARGIN, hp_y, BAR_MARGIN + hp_fill_width, hp_y + BAR_HEIGHT, stale and COLOR_MUTED or get_hp_color(hp_pct)) end
-- HP Bar border WindowRectOp(WIN_ID, miniwin.rect_frame, BAR_MARGIN, hp_y, BAR_MARGIN + bar_width, hp_y + BAR_HEIGHT, COLOR_BORDER)
-- HP Text (centered) local hp_text = string.format("HP: %d / %d (%d%%)", current_hp, max_hp, math.floor(hp_pct * 100)) local text_width = WindowTextWidth(WIN_ID, FONT_ID, hp_text) local text_x = BAR_MARGIN + (bar_width - text_width) / 2 local text_y = hp_y + (BAR_HEIGHT - FONT_SIZE) / 2 - 1
-- Text shadow WindowText(WIN_ID, FONT_ID, hp_text, text_x + 1, text_y + 1, 0, 0, COLOR_TEXT_SHADOW) WindowText(WIN_ID, FONT_ID, hp_text, text_x, text_y, 0, 0, COLOR_TEXT)
-- SP Bar background WindowRectOp(WIN_ID, miniwin.rect_fill, BAR_MARGIN, sp_y, BAR_MARGIN + bar_width, sp_y + BAR_HEIGHT, COLOR_BAR_BG)
-- SP Bar fill local sp_fill_width = math.floor(bar_width * sp_pct) if sp_fill_width > 0 then WindowRectOp(WIN_ID, miniwin.rect_fill, BAR_MARGIN, sp_y, BAR_MARGIN + sp_fill_width, sp_y + BAR_HEIGHT, stale and COLOR_MUTED or get_sp_color(sp_pct)) end
-- SP Bar border WindowRectOp(WIN_ID, miniwin.rect_frame, BAR_MARGIN, sp_y, BAR_MARGIN + bar_width, sp_y + BAR_HEIGHT, COLOR_BORDER)
-- SP Text (centered) local sp_text = string.format("SP: %d / %d (%d%%)", current_sp, max_sp, math.floor(sp_pct * 100)) text_width = WindowTextWidth(WIN_ID, FONT_ID, sp_text) text_x = BAR_MARGIN + (bar_width - text_width) / 2 text_y = sp_y + (BAR_HEIGHT - FONT_SIZE) / 2 - 1
-- Text shadow WindowText(WIN_ID, FONT_ID, sp_text, text_x + 1, text_y + 1, 0, 0, COLOR_TEXT_SHADOW) WindowText(WIN_ID, FONT_ID, sp_text, text_x, text_y, 0, 0, COLOR_TEXT)
-- Title bar with player name if player_name ~= "" then local title = player_name if stale then title = title .. " - stale " .. prompt_age() .. "s" elseif last_update == 0 then title = title .. " - waiting" end local title_y = WIN_HEIGHT - 14 local title_width = WindowTextWidth(WIN_ID, FONT_ID, title) local title_x = (WIN_WIDTH - title_width) / 2 WindowText(WIN_ID, FONT_ID, title, title_x + 1, title_y + 1, 0, 0, COLOR_TEXT_SHADOW) WindowText(WIN_ID, FONT_ID, title, title_x, title_y, 0, 0, stale and COLOR_STALE or ColourNameToRGB("silver")) end
draw_resize_tag() end
function on_party_prompt(name, line, wildcards) local who = wildcards[1]
-- Only update from party prompts if it's our own character if my_name == "" then -- Name not set yet, auto-detect from first solo prompt return end
if who:lower() ~= my_name:lower() then return end
player_name = who current_hp = tonumber(wildcards[2]) or 0 max_hp = tonumber(wildcards[3]) or 1 current_sp = tonumber(wildcards[4]) or 0 max_sp = tonumber(wildcards[5]) or 1 last_update = os.time()
draw_bars() end
function on_solo_prompt(name, line, wildcards) if my_name ~= "" then player_name = my_name end current_hp = tonumber(wildcards[1]) or 0 max_hp = tonumber(wildcards[2]) or 1 current_sp = tonumber(wildcards[3]) or 0 max_sp = tonumber(wildcards[4]) or 1 last_update = os.time()
draw_bars() end
function set_name(name, line, wildcards) set_character_name(wildcards[1]) end
function toggle_window(name, line, wildcards) set_visible(not window_visible, false) end
function reset_position(name, line, wildcards) WindowPosition(WIN_ID, 50, 50, 0, miniwin.create_absolute_location) if windowinfo then windowinfo.window_left = 50 windowinfo.window_top = 50 windowinfo.window_mode = 0 windowinfo.window_flags = miniwin.create_absolute_location end SetVariable("mw_" .. WIN_ID .. "_windowx", "50") SetVariable("mw_" .. WIN_ID .. "_windowy", "50") SetVariable("mw_" .. WIN_ID .. "_windowflags", "2") register_with_window_manager() ColourNote("lime", "", "Party Bars: Position reset to (50, 50)") end
function resize_window(name, line, wildcards) local new_width = tonumber(wildcards[1]) local new_height = tonumber(wildcards[2])
if new_width >= MIN_WIN_WIDTH and new_height >= MIN_WIN_HEIGHT then resize_to(new_width, new_height, false) else ColourNote("red", "", "Party Bars: Minimum size is " .. MIN_WIN_WIDTH .. "x" .. MIN_WIN_HEIGHT) end end
function show_status() print("") ColourNote("lime", "", "Party Bars status") ColourNote("khaki", "", " Window: " .. (window_visible and "visible" or "hidden")) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Window lock: " .. (manager_locked() and "locked" or "unlocked")) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Character name: " .. (my_name ~= "" and my_name or "(not set)")) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Size: " .. WIN_WIDTH .. " x " .. WIN_HEIGHT) ColourNote("khaki", "", " Current: " .. party_status_text()) print("") end
function copy_status() local ok, err = pcall(SetClipboard, party_status_text()) if ok then ColourNote("cyan", "", "Party Bars: Copied status to clipboard.") else ColourNote("red", "", "Party Bars: Copy failed: " .. tostring(err)) end end
function set_window_lock(name, line, wildcards) local mode = (wildcards[1] or ""):lower() if mode == "lock" then call_manager("lockWindows") else call_manager("unlockWindows") end end
function show_context_menu() local menu = {} local actions = {}
local function add(label, fn) menu[#menu + 1] = label actions[#actions + 1] = fn end
local function raw(label) menu[#menu + 1] = label end
add(window_visible and "Hide Party Bars" or "Show Party Bars", function() set_visible(not window_visible, false) end) add("Copy Party Status", copy_status) add("Show Status", show_status) raw("-") add("Set Character Name...", function() if not utils or not utils.inputbox then ColourNote("yellow", "", "Party Bars: Type 'partybars name <yourname>' to set your character name.") return end local ok, value = pcall(utils.inputbox, "Character name for Party Bars:", "Party Bars", my_name, "", 1) if ok and value and value ~= "" then set_character_name(value) end end) add("Reset Position", reset_position) raw(">Resize") add("Compact 220 x 70", function() resize_to(220, 70, false) end) add("Wide 280 x 86", function() resize_to(280, 86, false) end) add("Large 340 x 100", function() resize_to(340, 100, false) end) raw("<") raw("-") if manager_locked() then add("+Window Lock", function() call_manager("unlockWindows") end) else add("Window Lock", function() call_manager("lockWindows") end) end
local result = tonumber(WindowMenu(WIN_ID, WindowInfo(WIN_ID, 14), WindowInfo(WIN_ID, 15), "!" .. table.concat(menu, "|"))) if result and actions[result] then actions[result]() end end
function on_resize_down(flags, hotspot_id) if manager_locked() then return end resize_state = { left = WindowInfo(WIN_ID, 10), top = WindowInfo(WIN_ID, 11), last_refresh = 0, } end
function on_resize_drag(flags, hotspot_id) if manager_locked() or not resize_state then return end
local now = utils.timer() if now - resize_state.last_refresh < 0.033 then return end resize_state.last_refresh = now resize_to(WindowInfo(WIN_ID, 17) - resize_state.left, WindowInfo(WIN_ID, 18) - resize_state.top, true) end
function on_resize_release(flags, hotspot_id) if not resize_state then return end resize_to(WindowInfo(WIN_ID, 17) - resize_state.left, WindowInfo(WIN_ID, 18) - resize_state.top, true) resize_state = nil end
function on_resize_up(flags, hotspot_id) -- Release handler does the resize work. end
function on_stale_timer(name) if window_visible and last_update > 0 then draw_bars() end end
function OnPluginClose() WindowDelete(WIN_ID) end
function OnPluginBroadcast(msg, id, name, text) if id == ZOMBIE_WINDOW_MANAGER_ID and msg == 996 and text == "re-register z" then register_with_window_manager() elseif msg == 997 and text == "reset z windows" then reset_position() end end
